transitions.name: analyze_sentiment
transitions.description: Analyze the sentiment of the fetched feedback.
transitions.start_state_description: Feedback has been fetched and is ready for analysis.

process.name: perform_sentiment_analysis
process.description: Process to analyze sentiment of user feedback and generate a summary.

transitions.name: validate_analysis
transitions.description: Validate the results of the sentiment analysis for accuracy.
transitions.start_state_description: Sentiment analysis results are ready for validation.
transitions.end_state_description: Sentiment analysis results have been validated.

process.name: validate_sentiment_results
process.description: Process to ensure the sentiment analysis results meet quality standards.
